label: Psychic ritual
description: Defines a psychic ritual that pawns can perform. Specifies roles, outcomes, timing, and accessibility.

researchPrerequisite.label: Research prerequisite
researchPrerequisite.description: Research project that must be completed before this ritual can be cast.

allowsDrafting.label: Allows drafting
allowsDrafting.description: Whether the colony's pawns may be drafted while this ritual is in progress.

allowsFloatMenu.label: Allows float menu
allowsFloatMenu.description: Whether pawns show a float-menu option to join this ritual.

cooldownHours.label: Cooldown hours
cooldownHours.description: Hours that must pass before this ritual can be cast again.

nonRequiredPawnsMayLeave.label: Non-required pawns may leave
nonRequiredPawnsMayLeave.description: Whether pawns filling optional roles may leave the ritual area freely.

rolePowerFactor.label: Role power factor
rolePowerFactor.description: Multiplier applied to each filled role's contribution when calculating ritual power.

aiCastable.label: AI castable
aiCastable.description: Whether enemy factions can initiate this ritual.

playerCastable.label: Player castable
playerCastable.description: Whether the player colony can initiate this ritual.

minThreatPoints.label: Minimum threat points
minThreatPoints.description: Minimum raid threat-point budget required before this ritual can trigger.

castableOnPocketMaps.label: Castable on pocket maps
castableOnPocketMaps.description: Whether this ritual can be cast on pocket maps (anomaly pocket dimensions).

layerWhitelist.label: Layer whitelist
layerWhitelist.description: Planet layers on which this ritual is allowed. If empty, allowed on all layers.

letterAICompleteLabel.label: AI completion letter label
letterAICompleteLabel.description: Title of the letter sent to the player when an enemy faction completes this ritual.

letterAICompleteText.label: AI completion letter text
letterAICompleteText.description: Body of the letter sent when an enemy faction completes this ritual.

letterAIArrivedText.label: AI arrival letter text
letterAIArrivedText.description: Body of the letter sent when the enemy faction's ritual pawn arrives.

iconPath.label: Icon path
iconPath.description: Texture path for the ritual icon shown in the UI.
